source_boundary: Qiaomu-owned abstraction of visual asset acquisition methodology. This file does not vendor upstream prompts, templates, provider code, or image assets.

ai.label: AI generated image
ai.hard_rule: Generated images must not fake evidence, charts, screenshots, logos, UI, or editable slide layout objects.

source.label: Extracted from ingested source
source.hard_rule: Source images are evidence candidates; they still need image slots, crop policy, and provenance handling.

placeholder.label: Intentional placeholder
placeholder.hard_rule: A placeholder is a declared gap, not a completed image.

page_roles.hero_page: The image is the page's main visual voice, such as a cover, chapter divider, mood transition, single-number hero, or closing. SVG/PPT foreground may overlay editable text.
page_roles.local: The image sits inside a declared region of a slide, such as a side image, proof object, screenshot, card image, or context block. Do not reserve overlay space inside the image unless the slide contract actually overlays text.

text_policies.none: No text of any kind inside the generated image.
text_policies.embedded: Stable visual lettering or image-internal identifiers may be baked into the image, but page-level titles, body copy, captions, data values, sources, and editable claims stay in SVG/PPT foreground.

ai_renderings.editorial: Editorial magazine imagery with careful crop, controlled negative space, natural texture, and visual restraint.
ai_renderings.luxury-editorial: High-end magazine art direction with refined materials, strong photography logic, and sparse premium composition.
ai_renderings.blueprint: Technical schematic/blueprint language with precise linework, geometric rigor, restrained depth, and calm evidence surfaces.
ai_renderings.screen-print: Risograph or silkscreen-inspired flat color blocks, halftone texture, tactile paper grain, and slight registration imperfection.
ai_renderings.flat: Clean flat illustration with simplified silhouettes, crisp geometry, and clear compositional hierarchy.
ai_renderings.glassmorphism: Layered translucent depth, frosted surfaces, subtle highlights, and soft technology atmosphere.
ai_renderings.ink-notes: Ink or visual-note style with hand-drawn line quality, natural variation, and human explanatory warmth.
ai_renderings.corporate-photo: Editorial photography style with natural light, realistic setting, professional subjects, and restrained color grading.
ai_renderings.minimalist-swiss: Swiss modernist restraint, modular spacing, flat geometry, strong negative space, and functional hierarchy.
ai_renderings.atmospheric-texture: Texture-first abstract atmosphere with no subject, no layout scaffolding, and quiet background depth.

ai_palette_behaviors.duotone: Use two deck colors plus paper/background; one color dominates shapes, one small accent adds rhythm, and the background carries breathing space.
ai_palette_behaviors.cool-corporate: Use a calm professional base, restrained primary color for structure, and a small credible accent.
ai_palette_behaviors.dark-cinematic: Use a dark field, controlled light source, low saturation, and one small signal accent.
ai_palette_behaviors.mono-ink-red-signal: Use ink-like monochrome surfaces with a single red/signal accent, never rainbow highlights.
ai_palette_behaviors.tech-neon: Use dark or neutral technology depth with one constrained neon accent; avoid multi-color rails.
ai_palette_behaviors.warm-stone: Use warm neutral surfaces, quiet material texture, and muted accent details.
ai_palette_behaviors.vivid-launch: Use expressive flat color only when the route is event/launch/consumer; keep accents role-based and readable.
ai_palette_behaviors.mono-ink: Use black/gray ink values and paper-like background, with texture carrying warmth.
ai_palette_behaviors.custom: Use the custom palette_behavior prose from spec_lock.json.

hero_primitives.single_subject: One dominant object, product, symbol, or concept owns the image with generous negative space.
hero_primitives.portrait: One human subject or symbolic portrait with controlled background and no competing subject.
hero_primitives.typographic: A short stable word or number is the artwork itself; use only when the text should be rasterized.
hero_primitives.atmospheric: No dominant subject; quiet field for editable SVG/PPT foreground overlays.
hero_primitives.custom: Use custom composition prose that names subject count, layout structure, and breathing room.

prompt_contract.subject_accuracy_word_budget: 500-1000+ words when scientific, academic, engineering, medical, legal, or regulated visuals need field conventions
forbidden: mixing renderings or palette behaviors within one deck
showing HEX codes or color names as visible image text
baking editable slide titles, captions, bullets, data values, or sources into images
generating brand logos or trademarked product likenesses without user-owned assets
using generated images to replace source evidence

qiaomu_default_path.path_a: Configured API backend such as gpt-image-2 or another provider, when available.
qiaomu_default_path.path_b: Host-native image tool such as Codex built-in image generation, when available.
qiaomu_default_path.path_c: Offline manual mode: write prompts, mark Needs-Manual, and let the user place files later.
qiaomu_default_path.status_rule: Do not claim Generated unless a file exists at the expected project path.
